summary: Comprehensive testing of P0 BLOCK A - Offer Import/Export features. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified working - PDF/Excel export buttons, template download, import dialog with file upload, preview table, project selection, and confirm button.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting (<span> inside <tbody>/<tr>/<th>) - not blocking but should be fixed for cleaner HTML

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/offers/{id}/pdf returns valid PDF with offer lines, totals, company info
GET /api/offers/{id}/xlsx returns valid XLSX with structured data and sheet name '–û—Ñ–µ—Ä—Ç–∞'
GET /api/offer-import-template returns XLSX template with headers, examples, and '–ò–Ω—Å—Ç—Ä—É–∫—Ü–∏–∏' sheet
POST /api/offers/import-preview parses XLSX and returns preview with column mapping and warnings
POST /api/offers/import-confirm creates Draft offer from previewed lines with correct totals
Import handles Bulgarian units (–º2‚Üím2, –±—Ä‚Üípcs, —á–∞—Å–∞‚Üíhours etc.) correctly
Import preview warns about missing prices or unrecognized units
Template has 2 sheets: '–û—Ñ–µ—Ä—Ç–∞' (data with examples) and '–ò–Ω—Å—Ç—Ä—É–∫—Ü–∏–∏' (help text)
OfferEditorPage has PDF and Excel export buttons with data-testid='export-pdf-btn' and 'export-xlsx-btn'
OffersListPage has '–®–∞–±–ª–æ–Ω', '–ò–º–ø–æ—Ä—Ç', '+ –ù–æ–≤–∞ –æ—Ñ–µ—Ä—Ç–∞' buttons with proper data-testid attributes
Import dialog shows file upload, preview table with parsed lines, project selection dropdown, and confirm button
Import creates offer with offer_type='main' by default and notes imported file name
seed_data_creation: Created test offer 'TEST_Export_Offer' for export tests, cleaned up after tests. Import confirm test created 'TEST_Import_Confirm_Offer', cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offer import/export endpoints tested: GET /api/offers/{id}/pdf, GET /api/offers/{id}/xlsx, GET /api/offer-import-template (note: at root level, not under /api/offers/ due to route conflict), POST /api/offers/import-preview, POST /api/offers/import-confirm. Frontend data-testid values: export-pdf-btn, export-xlsx-btn, download-template-btn, import-offer-btn, import-dialog, confirm-import-btn, offers-list-page, offer-editor-page. Template filename: BEG_Work_Offer_Import_Template.xlsx. Import preview returns column_mapping, headers_found, warnings, and parsed lines array.

GET /api/offers/{id}/pdf returns valid P.notes: PDF starts with %PDF magic bytes, Content-Type: application/pdf, Content-Disposition: attachment

GET /api/offers/{id}/xlsx returns valid.notes: XLSX starts with PK (zip format), sheet named '–û—Ñ–µ—Ä—Ç–∞', has header row and data rows

GET /api/offer-import-template returns X.notes: Template has 2 sheets: '–û—Ñ–µ—Ä—Ç–∞' (data) and '–ò–Ω—Å—Ç—Ä—É–∫—Ü–∏–∏' (help). Filename: BEG_Work_Offer_Import_Template.xlsx

POST /api/offers/import-preview parses X.notes: Returns file_name, total_rows, parsed_lines, lines array, column_mapping, headers_found, warnings

POST /api/offers/import-confirm creates.notes: Creates Draft offer with sequential offer_no, correct line totals, and import_source field

PDF export works for both main and extra.notes: PDF includes label '–î–æ–ø—ä–ª–Ω–∏—Ç–µ–ª–Ω–∞ –æ—Ñ–µ—Ä—Ç–∞' for extra offers, '–û—Ñ–µ—Ä—Ç–∞' for main offers

XLSX includes location info in notes for.notes: Line notes include location info from floor/room/zone columns when present

Import preview warns about missing price.notes: Warnings array contains messages like '–Ý–µ–¥ X: –Ω—è–º–∞ —Ü–µ–Ω–∞ –∑–∞ Y' and '–Ý–µ–¥ X: –Ω–µ—Ä–∞–∑–ø–æ–∑–Ω–∞—Ç–∞ –º—è—Ä–∫–∞ Z'

Frontend: OfferEditorPage has PDF and Ex.notes: Buttons visible with data-testid='export-pdf-btn' and 'export-xlsx-btn', download works

Frontend: OffersListPage has '–®–∞–±–ª–æ.notes: All 3 buttons visible in header with correct data-testid attributes

Frontend: Import dialog shows file uploa.notes: Dialog opens, file upload works, preview shows parsed lines with descriptions/units/prices, project dropdown enables confirm button

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - All endpoints use real backend with MongoDB
